title: Internet Standardized
description: ARPANET switches to TCP/IP, marking the modern Internet's foundation.

title: World Wide Web Released
description: Tim Berners-Lee releases WWW software in 1991 and announces it on Internet newsgroups.

title: Human Genome Project Completed
description: The first essentially complete human genome sequence is announced.

title: Social Media Scales
description: Facebook launches as social networks begin reshaping online communication.

title: Modern Smartphone Era
description: The iPhone popularizes the modern touchscreen smartphone.

title: GPT Released
description: OpenAI releases GPT, helping launch the modern large language model era.

title: ChatGPT Launches
description: Conversational AI reaches a mass audience after ChatGPT launches in late 2022.
